templates.name: Pakistan NIC Card (psd3)
templates.ai_instructions: Pakistan NIC – bilingual (English + Urdu RTL). Front side fields: name_en, name_ur (RTL, Jameel Noori), father_en, father_ur (RTL), gender, country_of_stay, identity_number (13-digit CNIC format: 12345-6789012-3), date_of_birth (DD.MM.YYYY), date_of_issue (DD.MM.YYYY), date_of_expiry (DD.MM.YYYY). Photo placeholder top-right (portrait). Back side fields: address_en, address_ur (RTL). Left thumb placeholder. Both sides in one template.

templates.name: Old CNIC Card (ops2)
templates.ai_instructions: Old Pakistan CNIC – Urdu primary (Jameel Noori Nastaleeq). Front: name_ur (RTL), father_ur (RTL), identity_number (XXXXX-XXXXXXX-X), date_of_birth (DD/MM/YYYY), date_of_issue (DD/MM/YYYY), date_of_expiry (DD/MM/YYYY). Photo right side. Back: address_ur (RTL). Right thumb impression. Both sides in one template.
